Meaning.Vi: phòng chờ; phòng tiếp khách; phòng nghỉ (ở sân bay, nhà ga, khách sạn)
Meaning.En: A comfortable room or area in a hotel, airport, or other public building where people can sit and relax.
Meaning.Example: The airline offers lounge access to business-class passengers.

Situation.Vi: Người đi máy bay nghỉ ngơi trước khi lên tàu bay.
Situation.En: A traveler relaxes in an airport lounge before boarding their flight.

Situation.Vi: Khách sạn có phòng chờ sang trọng cho khách hàng cao cấp.
Situation.En: The hotel features a luxury lounge for its premium guests.

Meaning.Vi: nghỉ ngơi; nằm dài; thư giãn (thường ở nơi thoải mái)
Meaning.En: To relax or recline in a comfortable and idle way, often in a lounge or similar setting.
Meaning.Example: After work, he likes to lounge on the sofa and watch TV.

Situation.Vi: Sau bữa ăn trưa, cô ấy nằm dài trên ghế sofa.
Situation.En: After lunch, she lounged on the sofa reading a magazine.

Situation.Vi: Họ lounge bên bể bơi trong kỳ nghỉ dưỡng.
Situation.En: They lounged by the pool during their vacation.
